overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character exploring the Hufflepuff common room. The character walks through a cozy dormitory with wooden furniture and trophies, exits through a round door into a plant-filled corridor, descends a spiral staircase, and enters a large common room area with other students gathered by the fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds and house banners

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory room, looking at the beds and trophy collection

entered.detail: red wooden bed with white pillows and red curtains
wooden sign with 'HUFFLEPUFF' carved into it mounted above a bed
wooden dresser displaying silver trophies and cups under a stained glass window
framed pictures and banners on the stone brick walls
tall lamp with glowing light next to the bed

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy dormitory room with red wooden four-poster beds, a Hufflepuff banner on the far wall, and trophies displayed under a stained glass window. The room has warm lighting from floor lamps and wall sconces, with patterned rugs covering the floor.

events.description: character opens the round wooden door and steps through into the corridor beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening the round door to exit the dormitory

entered.detail: large circular wooden door with intricate carvings and stained glass panels
ornate mirror with a decorative frame reflecting the room

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large round wooden door with stained glass panels, opens it, and steps through into a corridor. The transition moves from the enclosed dormitory to a wooden hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden corridor with round doors and potted plants

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden corridor past multiple round doors and potted plants

entered.detail: carved wooden banister overlooking the lower level
circular wooden door with green and yellow stained glass panels
green leafy plants in pots along the corridor
glowing lanterns mounted on the wooden walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden corridor lined with round doors featuring stained glass, potted plants, and glowing wall lanterns. The corridor has a wooden railing overlooking a lower level and is decorated with red flowers and patterned rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase with carved wood paneling

events.description: character begins descending the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down the spiral staircase toward the lower level

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure standing at the bottom of the stairs near a counter

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with carved banisters descending to the lower floor
framed portraits and paintings on the stairwell walls
intricately carved wooden wall panels with decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: The character descends a spiral staircase with carved wooden paneling and framed portraits on the walls. At the bottom, a ghostly figure stands near a wooden counter in the lower common room area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main common room with fireplace and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room past groups of students sitting by the fireplace

notable_agents.action: group of students sitting on red sofas conversing near the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with a roaring fire and mantle decorations
plush red upholstered seating arranged in a circle
circular patterned rugs on the stone tile floor
hanging light fixture with multiple glowing lamps

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main common room, a large open space with a central stone fireplace, red sofas, and circular rugs. Other students are gathered in groups sitting and conversing near the fire, while the room features wooden pillars and hanging chandeliers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a cozy dormitory into an expansive, plant-filled wooden corridor. It begins by exploring a warm room featuring red four-poster beds, a Hufflepuff banner, and trophies displayed beneath a stained glass window. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the enclosed living space toward a large round wooden door with stained glass panels. Upon opening the door, the camera steps through the threshold and expands into an elevated hallway lined with glowing lanterns and potted plants. The movement finally follows the length of this wooden corridor, passing red flowers and patterned rugs along a railing that overlooks a lower level.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed staircase into the expansive warmth of a bustling common room. It begins by descending a spiral staircase lined with carved wooden paneling and framed portraits, moving downward toward a ghostly figure waiting by a wooden counter. As the camera reaches the bottom, the confined space opens up into a large, airy hall characterized by wooden pillars and hanging chandeliers. The scene then expands to reveal a central stone fireplace surrounded by red sofas and circular rugs, where groups of students are gathered in conversation.
